assertions.assertion: Uses WebApplicationFactory<Program> with ConfigureTestServices to override IdentityServer registration
Sets options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false to avoid disk writes in CI
Calls AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) for a static test signing key
Registers clients via AddInMemoryClients — no sub-documents needed for this core pattern
assertions.rationale: AddInMemoryClients with a client credentials client
